sanskrit:
नभःस्पृशं दीप्तमनेकवर्णं व्यात्ताननं दीप्तविशालनेत्रम्।
दृष्ट्वा हि त्वां प्रव्यथितान्तरात्मा धृतिं न विन्दामि शमं च विष्णो॥
transliteration:
nabhaḥspṛśaṃ dīptam anekavarṇaṃ vyāttānanaṃ dīptaviśālanetram |
dṛṣṭvā hi tvāṃ pravyathitāntarātmā dhṛtiṃ na vindāmi śamaṃ ca viṣṇo ||
literal_meaning: sky-touching / blazing / many-coloured / gaping-mouthed / blazing-wide-eyed / having-seen / indeed / You / agitated-inmost-self / steadiness / not / I-find / calm / and / O Viṣṇu
contextual_meaning: Arjuna’s ego-boundaries are overwhelmed by a transpersonal vision; cognitive-affective systems collapse into awe-terror, dissolving ordinary self-regulation.
psychological_state: Acute self-disintegration under transpersonal stimuli; loss of mentalization and distress tolerance.
trigger_scenario: A high-functioning professional suddenly confronts climate-catastrophe imagery or VR simulation of cosmic scale—racing heart, vertigo, inability to ground.
anchor_text: When the infinite stares back, the small self dissolves into wordless awe.
